definition: Stock-based compensation contaminates the quality (QMJ) factor: 100-200bp of the measured quality premium (30-40% of total) is an SBC artifact. When sorted on GAAP rather than non-GAAP earnings, 2-3 Mag-7 names shift from the top quintile to the 2nd-3rd quintile.
evidence: 100-200bp of QMJ premium is SBC artifact (30-40% of measured premium)
2-3 Mag-7 names shift from top to 2nd-3rd quintile on GAAP sort
Quality factor contamination confirmed across independent analytical frameworks
open_questions: Whether factor providers will recalibrate quality definitions to account for SBC
Impact on smart beta products tracking quality factors
